omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We use crash log information regarding your device's use of the Application for troubleshooting and to improve our Application. Crash logs do not contain your IP addresses or other personal information.

We track the services you have enabled and the amount of data you have transferred via the Application. We also use performance data to understand how the Application impacts your Internet connection and to improve our Application. Performance Data does not include personal information.

We track the services you have enabled and the amount of data you have transferred via the Application. We also use performance data to understand how the Application impacts your Internet connection and to improve our Application. Performance Data does not include personal information.
We use account information, such as your account ID, to administer your account and authorize Internet requests from your device to the Cloudflare network.
If you subscribe to Paid Application Services, we use subscription information, such as your order ID, to administer those subscriptions.

We require your email address when you provide feedback and bug reports. When you provide feedback, you can choose whether to share your console logs. Console logs can include your device name and IP address. We use this information for troubleshooting and to improve our Application. Your email address will be deleted 6 months from the date of collection.
